name: Empanada (Meat Pie)
recipeIngredient: 2 Hard Boiled Eggs, Cold and Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry onions in cooking oil until soft.
2. Add minced garlic and brown lightly.
3. Drain the oil.
4. Add ground beef to onions and sauté until meat turns a light brown.
5. Add chopped olives, eggs, salt, black pepper, raisins, pinch of red pepper, and milk. Allow to simmer (uncovered) over low heat for 5 minutes.
6. Prepare pastry dough using a commercial pie crust mix or your favorite recipe. Roll out the dough to an 1/8-inch thickness and cut with a 5-inch cutter.
7. Place meat filling on one side of the dough. Fold the other side over the filling and pinch the edges.
8. Deep fry in hot cooking oil until crisp and brown, or bake in a 400°F oven until the crust is golden brown.
9. Yields 5 meat pies.
